title: Smoky Arabian Pilaf
description: A flavorful twist on traditional rice pilaf from the Middle East, infused with smoky spices and aromas.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add rice and pilaf, stirring to coat with oil and mix with onion and garlic.
Add spice blend, salt, and water; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until liquid is absorbed.
Fluff with a fork and garnish with parsley, if using.
